list.title: All orders
list.subtitle: The full order queue, newest first. Click a row to manage.
list.errorLoad: Couldn't load the order queue. Please refresh.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.subtitle: Once buyers place orders they'll show up here.
empty.subtitleFiltered: No orders match the current filter.

detail.notFoundSubtitle: We couldn't find this order in the database.
detail.errorSubtitle: Something went wrong. Please try again.

transition.heading: Move order forward
transition.terminalState: This order is in a terminal state; no further transitions are possible.
transition.reasonPlaceholderOptional: Optional note (visible in the order's audit log).
transition.reasonPlaceholderRequired: Why is the order being cancelled? (required, shown to the buyer)
transition.reasonRequired: A reason is required when cancelling an order.
transition.errorUnknown: Couldn't update the order. Please try again.

proofs.noneYet: The buyer hasn't uploaded a payment proof yet.
proofs.approveConfirm: Approve this payment proof? The order will move to Paid.
proofs.rejectConfirm: Reject this payment proof? Order bounces back to Pending and the buyer can re-upload.
proofs.rejectReasonRequired: A reason is required when rejecting a proof.
proofs.errorUnknown: Couldn't update the proof. Please try again.
